policy_price_floor_rule.description: Never advertise below total invested cost without approval.

data._note: This tool is a PROPOSED addition (docs/vauto-mcp-contract.md §3.5). product-spec.md §11.9 and §11.10 make policy floor and risk floor two of the four inputs to minimum safe transaction price, and no tool in §10 returns them. See docs/open-questions.md C1.
